TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Satefo == u sulit nu Hulam šłčŚĺ∑ś≠¶ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Satefo. u kasalumaluma' nu Satefo sa, 63 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 148 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 136 ku tademaw, pakalatu 92%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 12 ku tademaw, pakalatu 8%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 81%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sakizaya 1%, zumazuma 8%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == sat…ôfo == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sat…ôfo. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu sat…ôfo sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sakizaja *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
S.FORM: == Satefo == u sulit nu Hulam šłčŚĺ∑ś≠¶ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Satefo. u kasalumaluma' nu Satefo sa, 63 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 148 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 136 ku tademaw, pakalatu 92%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 12 ku tademaw, pakalatu 8%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 81%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sakizaya 1%, zumazuma 8%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == sat…ôfo == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sat…ôfo. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu sat…ôfo sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sakizaja *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
